'''Pii IV'''<ref name="Core">[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]]</ref> was a logging [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Pii system/Legends|Pii system]] in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was one of "[[Teeda's Eyes]]."

{{Planet-stub}}
